name: GCVE CPE Editor - curated CPE dictionary
description: Pulls curated CPE (Common Platform Enumeration) records from a GCVE-EU CPE Editor instance (https://github.com/gcve-eu/cpe-editor, v1.1.0+) via its read-only OpenAPI (vendors / products / cpes / changes) and normalizes each to a CPE dictionary entry -> XORCISM.CPE (the platform/software identifiers used for CVE<->asset matching, SCA and OVAL/vulnerable-configuration tests). CPE Editor makes curated CPE data easier to explore, review, publish and run in production, with alias/duplicate detection and NVD CPE-Match / PURL mappings. Modes: live (base_url -> GET /api/v1/cpes), file (an exported JSON or NDJSON dataset from the editor), or demo. Read-only. Config: CPE_EDITOR_URL (or pass base_url), optional CPE_EDITOR_TOKEN bearer.

parameters.name: base_url
parameters.help: CPE Editor instance base URL (overrides CPE_EDITOR_URL), e.g. https://cpe.example.org . The connector calls <base_url>/api/v1/cpes.

parameters.name: search
parameters.help: Optional vendor/product/CPE substring filter passed to the API (live).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path to an exported CPE dataset (JSON array, {"cpes":[...]} object, or NDJSON one record per line). A small demo sample is used if omitted and no base_url is set.
